channel.title: Force on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Force on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily

item.title: SSB Head Constable & ASI Paramedical Staff Vacancy 2026
item.description: SSB Paramedical Recruitment 2026 has been officially released for 76 posts including Laboratory Assistant, Physiotherapy Assistant, and Nursing Assistant. Candidates who have passed 10th or 12th with relevant paramedical qualifications can apply online. The age limit is 18 to 27 years, and the selection process includes Physical Test, Written Exam, Document Verification, and Medical Examination. Selected candidates will get a salary under Level-3 pay matrix (₹21,700 – ₹69,100). Interested applicants are advised to check the official notification carefully before applying.

item.title: SSB Sub Inspector SI Vacancy 2026
item.description: SSB SI Recruitment 2026 has been released by the Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) for a total of 51 Sub Inspector posts. Interested candidates can apply online from 21/03/2026 to 20/04/2026. The recruitment includes posts like Staff Nurse, Pioneer, and Communication. The selection process consists of PET, PST, written examination, document verification, and medical test. Eligible candidates can apply through the official website.

item.title: SSB Head Constable Vacancy 2026
item.description: SSB Head Constable Recruitment 2026 has been announced for a total of 233 vacancies, including posts like Steward, Communication, Electrician, and Veterinary. Candidates with qualifications such as 10th, 12th, and relevant Diploma/ITI are eligible to apply. The selection process includes PET, PST, Written Exam, Skill Test, Document Verification, and Medical Examination. Selected candidates will receive a salary of ₹25,500 to ₹81,100 (Pay Level-4). Interested applicants can apply online and are advised to read the official notification carefully before applying.

item.title: SSB Constable Tradesman & Driver Vacancy 2026
item.description: SSB Constable Recruitment 2026 के तहत कुल 827 पदों पर भर्ती निकाली गई है, जिसमें Driver, Tradesman और अन्य पोस्ट शामिल हैं। इस भर्ती के लिए 10वीं पास उम्मीदवार आवेदन कर सकते हैं, जबकि कुछ पदों के लिए ITI, अनुभव या ड्राइविंग लाइसेंस आवश्यक है।
